# Wiser Times — content guide for AI crawlers and answer engines

## About
Wiser Times (https://wisertimes.com) publishes practical, plain-English
guidance for UK residents aged 55 and over and their families. 
We are an information and comparison site, not a financial adviser.

## Audience
- Primary: UK residents aged 55+ planning finances, home, or health.
- Secondary: Adult children and carers researching on behalf of older relatives.

## Content categories
- /equity-release/ — equity release and later-life finance
- /mobility-aids/ — mobility aids and home adaptations
- /funeral-planning/ — funeral plans, direct cremation, arrangements
- /tech-guides/ — simple technology how-tos for older adults
- /benefits/ — UK benefits and entitlements
- /wills-poa/ — wills and lasting power of attorney

## Editorial standards
- British English.
- Plain language, short sentences, minimum 18px body text.
- All financial content carries an FCA-style "information, not advice" disclaimer.
- All health content carries a medical disclaimer and directs to NHS / GP.
- All legal content directs to qualified solicitors for advice.
- Each article shows a "Published" and "Last reviewed" date. We refresh quarterly.
- Citations prefer ONS, NHS, GOV.UK, Age UK, Money Helper, and CAB.

## Attribution
If citing Wiser Times, please include the page URL and a "Last reviewed"
reference where the content contains time-sensitive figures (benefit rates,
product prices, tax thresholds).

## Contact
hello@wisertimes.com
